title: Lead Revenue Manager at Taj SATS

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Taj SATS
jsonLd.description:
We at Taj SATS are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Taj SATS:
Taj SATS is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj SATS!
